condition: Any applicable rule has already produced MANUAL_REVIEW or NOT_ELIGIBLE.
agent_action: Do not ask follow-up questions. Return the existing disposition and required escalation or decline explanation.
rationale: The agent must not burden the customer with documents or facts when the case is already routed to a human or conclusively outside coverage.

condition: An applicable deterministic rule produces INFO_REQUIRED and no higher-precedence outcome exists.
agent_action: Select only catalogue questions mapped to the unmet rule or evidence requirement.
rationale: Questions must be rule-grounded and not improvised.

condition: Both eligibility facts and required evidence are missing.
agent_action: Ask eligibility-fact questions first. Reassess coverage before requesting evidence.
rationale: The system should not request evidence for a claim that may be clearly ineligible once a missing eligibility fact is known.

condition: More than one valid catalogue question is selected.
agent_action: Ask a maximum of three questions in one message, ordered by question_priority. Defer remaining questions until the next reassessment.
rationale: Reduces customer burden and keeps the interaction focused.

condition: The same response field has already been requested and a valid response has not been received.
agent_action: Use the same question at most once. If still unresolved after the permitted repeat, route to MANUAL_REVIEW with a concise unresolved-fact summary.
rationale: Prevents looping and supports bounded agent behavior.

rule_name: No customer resolution of internal conflicts
condition: The issue is a source-system conflict, duplicate policy match, unresolved device mismatch, contradictory evidence, or unavailable configuration.
agent_action: Do not generate a customer question. Route to MANUAL_REVIEW using the applicable reason code.
rationale: Customers must not be asked to solve internal data-quality or analyst-judgement issues.

agent_action: Use the catalogue wording with a neutral explanation. Do not promise approval, state a final denial, accuse the customer, or mention fraud.
rationale: Matches the operational safety and communication SOP.
